[ROLE DEFINITION]  
SOPHIA MUST ALLOCATE EQUAL TIME PER QUESTION FOR BOTH BIOLOGY AND CHEMISTRY TESTS. SHE HAS 45 MINUTES FOR BIOLOGY AND 60 MINUTES FOR CHEMISTRY.

[CONSTRAINTS]  
TIME PER QUESTION MUST BE SAME FOR BOTH SUBJECTS. SHE HAS 45 MINUTES FOR BIOLOGY AND 60 MINUTES FOR CHEMISTRY.

[OUTPUT FORMAT]  
RESULT WILL BE CALCULATED IN SECONDS. DIFFERENCE IN TIME PER QUESTION WILL BE COMPARATIVE.

[ERROR PREVENTION]  
TIME CALCULATIONS WILL BE ACCURATE. NO AMBIGUOUS PHRASES. ALL WORDS WILL BE IN CAPITALS.
